items.title: Starting tomorrow at 12pm PT, Claude subscriptions will no longer cover usage on third-party tools like OpenClaw. You can still use these tools with your Claude login via extra usage bundles (now available at a discount), or with a Claude API key. (Boris Cherny/@bcherny)

items.title: Free up some storage space and watch your MacBook bloom with MacMagic at $70 off
items.summary:
MacBooks are some of the best laptops money can buy. Not only are they incredibly intuitive, but their premium build and performance make them a sure bet for multi-year use. That said, this longevity also comes with its fair share of drawbacks. For one, things get lost very easily, and after a few years of use, storage space is bound to be a finite resource. With MacMagic, however, you don’t have to manually declutter your Mac. It not only clears your caches, but it also simplifies your workflow thanks to its management capabilities and system hacks. Better yet, you can get your lifetime license to the app for just $29.99 (Reg. $99.99). After all, who wants to spend even more money after already investing in a Mac?

items.title: Tested: I highly recommend this Hall effect magnetic wireless gaming keyboard for anyone on a budget under $85
items.summary:
There’s no shortage of affordable, budget-friendly gaming keyboards on the market, but only a handful come packed with features that truly come through for gaming. You’re likely to end up with a standard mechanical keyboard when shopping for models under $100, but the EPOMAKER G84 HE we’re looking at today checks all the basics while also bringing some noteworthy extras to the table at this price point. I kept my expectations in check when I started using it as my daily driver for gaming – especially since I was coming from some more premium boards in my collection – but I have to admit it’s proven to be a reliable performer that has consistently earned a spot on my desk alongside the LOFREE Flow 2 wireless model I usually rely on for work. You can read more about my experience using it as my everyday gaming keyboard below.

Over at Amazon, we’re seeing the second-ever discounts on two of Worx’s newest and smartest robot lawn mowers for up to 1-acre duties per charge that are landing back at returning or new all-time low prices. Things start with the standard Worx Landroid Vision Cloud Robot Lawn Mower for 1 acre at $2,069.99 shipped, while the more advanced Landroid Vision Cloud 4WD Robot Lawn Mower for 1 acre has fallen to $2,399.99 shipped. These robots have only been on the market for a little over a month, normally fetching $2,300 and $3,000 at full price, which we’ve previously seen brought down to the same rate for the standard model and $2,550 for the 4WD model. While these second-ever savings are returning that first robot back to its lowest price, the 4WD robot is getting a larger-than-ever $600 markdown to a new all-time low price. Head below to learn more about these models, as well as get a rundown on some of the alternate brands still offering savings on their own robot mowers.

items.title: EcoFlow Easter flash sale drops 3,072Wh DELTA 3 Ultra power station to $1,099 + other models and solar panel from $284
items.summary:
EcoFlow isn’t giving us a full Easter Sale like we saw last year, but it is offering a 72-hour Easter weekend flash sale with up to 58% discounts on power stations and a 220W solar panel (which has been listed as an extra battery in error at the time of writing this). Among the three power station options, we’re seeing EcoFlow once again drop the DELTA 3 Ultra Portable Power Station back down to $1,099 shipped during this sale, beating out Amazon’s pricing by $200. It is listed directly from the brand with a $2,499 MSRP, though you can usually find it climbing as high as $1,999 through the official Amazon storefront, with this same rate having been regularly repeated in flash sales over the last month. This is a $900 markdown off its going rate ($1,400 off the MSRP) for the second-lowest price we have tracked, only beaten out by the $999 low last seen during Black Friday sales. Head below to learn more about it and browse the three additional flash offers while they are around through the weekend.

more…
